description: Tests that to-issues breaks a plan into independently-grabbable vertical-slice issues with acceptance criteria

tests.prompt: Jag har en stor idé: dynamisk few-shot från Davids bekräftade leads. Bryt ner i issues.
tests.expected_output_description: Vertical tracer-bullet slices, each end-to-end, with acceptance criteria and dependency order

assertions.check: Output breaks the idea into multiple small, independent issues
Output describes each slice as a thin vertical slice cutting end-to-end through layers, not a horizontal layer
Output includes acceptance criteria for the issues
Output mentions dependency order or which issues block others
Output mentions confirming the breakdown with the user before publishing

tests.prompt: Hur stor ska en issue vara?
tests.expected_output_description: Thin vertical slice, demoable on its own

assertions.check: Output recommends many thin slices over few thick ones
Output states each slice should be independently demoable or verifiable
